programs.title: Bewitched
programs.desc: Serena turns Darrin's mother into a cat.

programs.title: Bewitched
programs.desc: Serena wants to try mortal men and gets a date through a computer dating service.

programs.title: My Way
programs.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story about how they live their best life. It's a lifestyle program that allows people to tell their own stories firsthand to say, 'I'm doing this My Way'.

programs.title: Lego Masters
programs.desc: In the lead up to finals week and a known elimination, teams must build their creations on a rotating baseplate, that reveals a story in three different parts encompassing a beginning, middle and end.

programs.title: Lego Masters
programs.desc: Teams are given a LEGO cloud and have fourteen hours to create something that belongs on that cloud, with one team being eliminated at the end and the three remaining teams will compete in the final.

programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: Maxwell and Fran face a difference in opinion on how to raise the children when Maxwell reverses a decision Fran made regarding not allowing Brighton to go to the mall.
